---
title: Structural Mechanics
---

> Auto-generated 2026-05-06 19:23 UTC &nbsp;·&nbsp; 58 plots

3D linear-elasticity compliance minimisation on a cantilever beam with SIMP material penalisation (p=3, E_max=70 000 MPa). The stiffness matrix K(ρ) couples every density element to the global displacement field via the constitutive relation E_eff(ρ) = E_min + (E_max − E_min)·ρ³; the compliance objective C = F^T K(ρ)⁻¹ F is smooth but non-convex in ρ, driving gradient-based topology optimisation toward sparse binary 0/1 layouts.

::: {.callout-note title='Boundary conditions'}

3-D cantilever beam on domain [0,2]×[0,1]×[0,1] (HEX8 elements, 2:1:1 aspect). Dirichlet: all nodes at x=0 have zero displacement (clamped). Neumann: a prescribed total force is applied to the right face (x=2) — either a uniform downward traction or a concentrated upward corner load depending on the experiment (controlled by the corner_load flag).

:::

## Initial Conditions

Visualisation of each initial condition available for this problem. IC plots are generated without running any solver.

### Random

Gaussian-noise density field centred at ρ₀=0.5 (σ=0.3, clipped to [0.05, 0.95]); breaks spatial symmetry so gradient experiments see non-trivial per-cell sensitivity.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/ics/random/ic.png){.lightbox}

### Two Density Bumps

Ground-truth density with two stiff Gaussian pillars (ρ_peak=0.95, σ=0.12·min(Lx,Lz)) at (0.35·Lx, 0.5·Ly, 0.5·Lz) and (0.75·Lx, 0.5·Ly, 0.5·Lz) on a soft ρ_bg=0.1 background; analog of thermal-mesh ``two_gaussians`` for the load-recovery inverse experiment (recover density from displacement observations).


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/ics/two_density_bumps/ic.png){.lightbox}

### Uniform

Uniform SIMP material density ρ₀ over all hex mesh elements; standard homogeneous starting point for topology optimisation of the cantilever beam.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/ics/uniform/ic.png){.lightbox}

## Forward

Forward-pass benchmarks: agreement between solvers, field diagnostics, and long-run stability.

### Agreement

Forward accuracy sweep across element density ρ₀ for each solver.

Structural compliance C = F^T U vs element density ρ₀ for each solver (log-scale; full-face downward load). jax_fem uses surface traction; topopt_jl distributes force uniformly across right-face nodes — non-uniform shape-function weighting in jax_fem causes a small but consistent compliance difference (~0.5–3%) across all densities.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

Sweeps `rho_0` ∈ {0.2, 0.4, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": false
  },
  "sweep": {
    "key": "rho_0",
    "values": [
      0.2,
      0.4,
      0.5,
      0.7,
      0.9
    ]
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/forward/agreement/curves.png){.lightbox}

### Baseline

Inter-solver compliance agreement sweep over mesh resolution N.

Structural compliance C = F^T U vs mesh resolution N for each solver (uniform density ρ₀=0.5, full-face downward load). Both solvers implement HEX8 FEM; compliance should agree to <1% at all resolutions.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

Sweeps `N` ∈ {4, 6, 8, 12, 16}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": false
  },
  "sweep": {
    "key": "N",
    "values": [
      4,
      6,
      8,
      12,
      16
    ]
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/forward/baseline/curves.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/forward/baseline/convergence.png){.lightbox}

### Physical Laws

Structural compliance vs applied load F_total to verify quadratic scaling law C ∝ F².

Structural compliance C = F^T U vs total load F_total at fixed N=8 (nx=8, ny=2, nz=4), ρ₀=0.5. For linear elasticity C = F^T K⁻¹ F ∝ F², so log-log slope must be 2.0. Deviations across solvers reveal errors in the stiffness assembly or force application.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

Sweeps `F_total` ∈ {0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 4.0}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "corner_load": false,
    "rho_0": 0.5
  },
  "sweep": {
    "key": "F_total",
    "values": [
      0.25,
      0.5,
      1.0,
      2.0,
      4.0
    ]
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/forward/physical_laws/physical_laws.png){.lightbox}

## Gradient

Gradient benchmarks: finite-difference checks and gradient quality (magnitude, direction cosine) across parameter, resolution, and horizon sweeps.

### Finite-Difference Check

FD gradient check vs analytic VJP at nominal mesh and load.

U-curves (FD gradient error vs ε), direction cosine between AD and FD gradient vectors, and gradient magnitude field panels.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "random",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true
  },
  "fd": {
    "eps_values": [
      2.0,
      0.5,
      0.1,
      0.03,
      0.01,
      0.003,
      0.001,
      0.0003,
      0.0001
    ],
    "n_dirs": 6
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/fd_check/fd_check.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/fd_check/gradient_fields.png){.lightbox}

### Parameter Sweep

Gradient quality vs element density ρ₀ at fixed mesh.

Gradient norm, best-ε FD error, direction cosine, and U-curves vs element density ρ₀.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

Sweeps `rho_0` ∈ {0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true
  },
  "fd": {
    "eps_values": [
      0.5,
      0.1,
      0.03,
      0.01,
      0.003,
      0.001,
      0.0003
    ],
    "n_dirs": 6
  },
  "sweep": {
    "key": "rho_0",
    "values": [
      0.2,
      0.4,
      0.6,
      0.8
    ]
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/param_sweep/error_vs_param.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/param_sweep/param_sweep.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/param_sweep/ucurves.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/param_sweep/best_eps_vs_param.png){.lightbox}

### Jacobian Svd

Jacobian SVD and gradient subspace analysis at nominal mesh.

Singular-value spectrum of the stacked per-solver gradient matrix and pairwise cosine similarity between JAX-FEM and TopOpt.jl gradient directions. Both solvers implement the same SIMP adjoint so cosine similarity should be near 1; deviations indicate differing adjoint formulations or numerical precision.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "random",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 8,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 4,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true
  },
  "jacobian": {
    "n_alphas": 21,
    "alpha_range": 0.2
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/jacobian_svd/gradient_fields.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/jacobian_svd/jacobian_svd.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/gradient/jacobian_svd/landscape.png){.lightbox}

## Optimization

Optimization benchmarks: gradient-based recovery of initial conditions or physical parameters, topology optimization, and drag minimization.

### Topology Optimisation

SIMP topology optimisation: minimise structural compliance under volume fraction constraint.

SIMP topology optimisation on a 16×8×8 cantilever beam: minimise compliance C = F^T U subject to a 50% volume fraction constraint (Adam, lr=0.02). Density field evolves from uniform ρ=0.5 toward a binary 0/1 layout; both solvers converge to the same topology confirming consistent adjoint gradients.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 16,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 8,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true,
    "v_frac": 0.5,
    "compliance_key": "compliance",
    "penalty_weight": 50.0,
    "x_min": 0.001,
    "snap_interval": 10
  },
  "optim": {
    "lr": 0.05,
    "max_iters": 2500,
    "patience": 100
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_convergence.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_fields.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_3d_fenics_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_3d_firedrake_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_3d_jax_fem.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_3d_topopt_jl.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_evolution_fenics_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_evolution_firedrake_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_evolution_jax_fem.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt/topopt_evolution_topopt_jl.gif){.lightbox}

### Topopt Bfgs

SIMP topology optimisation with L-BFGS: minimise structural compliance under volume fraction constraint.

SIMP topology optimisation on a 16×8×8 cantilever beam with L-BFGS: minimise compliance C = F^T U subject to a 50% volume fraction constraint.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 16,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 8,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true,
    "v_frac": 0.5,
    "compliance_key": "compliance",
    "penalty_weight": 50.0,
    "x_min": 0.001,
    "snap_interval": 5
  },
  "optim": {
    "max_iters": 100,
    "patience": 20
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_convergence.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_fields.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_3d_fenics_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_3d_firedrake_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_3d_jax_fem.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_3d_topopt_jl.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_evolution_fenics_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_evolution_firedrake_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_evolution_jax_fem.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_bfgs/topopt_evolution_topopt_jl.gif){.lightbox}

### Topopt Mma

SIMP topology optimisation with MMA (nlopt LD_MMA): hard volume fraction constraint.

SIMP topology optimisation on a 16×2×8 cantilever beam with MMA: minimise compliance C = F^T U subject to a hard 50% volume fraction inequality constraint.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 16,
    "ny": 2,
    "nz": 8,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true,
    "v_frac": 0.5,
    "compliance_key": "compliance",
    "x_min": 0.001,
    "snap_interval": 5
  },
  "optim": {
    "max_iters": 200,
    "patience": 30
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_convergence.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_fields.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_3d_fenics_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_3d_firedrake_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_3d_jax_fem.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_3d_topopt_jl.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_evolution_fenics_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_evolution_firedrake_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_evolution_jax_fem.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma/topopt_evolution_topopt_jl.gif){.lightbox}

### Topopt Mma Fine

SIMP topology optimisation with MMA on a fine 32×4×16 mesh (8× more elements than topopt_mma). Tests whether solver cross-solver agreement holds at higher resolution.

SIMP topology optimisation on a fine 32×4×16 cantilever beam with MMA: minimise compliance C = F^T U subject to a hard 50% volume fraction inequality constraint.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

```json
{
  "ic": {
    "name": "uniform",
    "seed": 0
  },
  "physics": {
    "nx": 32,
    "ny": 4,
    "nz": 16,
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "corner_load": true,
    "v_frac": 0.5,
    "compliance_key": "compliance",
    "x_min": 0.001,
    "snap_interval": 10
  },
  "optim": {
    "max_iters": 300,
    "patience": 40
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_convergence.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_fields.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_3d_fenics_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_3d_firedrake_structural.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_3d_jax_fem.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_3d_topopt_jl.png){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_evolution_fenics_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_evolution_firedrake_structural.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_evolution_jax_fem.gif){.lightbox}
![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/optimization/topopt_mma_fine/topopt_evolution_topopt_jl.gif){.lightbox}

## Cost

Wall-clock cost scaling with problem size N and number of integration steps.

Wall-clock and memory profiling vs mesh size for all solvers.


::: {.callout-note collapse='true' title='Settings'}

**Spatial Cost**

Sweeps N ∈ {8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 3200}

```json
{
  "physics": {
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "rho_0": 0.5,
    "corner_load": false
  },
  "cost": {
    "N_values": [
      8,
      16,
      32,
      64,
      128,
      256,
      512,
      1024,
      2048,
      3200
    ],
    "n_trials": 3
  }
}
```

**Vjp Cost**

Sweeps N ∈ {8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 3200}

```json
{
  "physics": {
    "Lx": 2.0,
    "Ly": 1.0,
    "Lz": 1.0,
    "F_total": 1.0,
    "rho_0": 0.5,
    "corner_load": false
  },
  "cost": {
    "N_values": [
      8,
      16,
      32,
      64,
      128,
      256,
      512,
      1024,
      2048,
      3200
    ],
    "n_trials": 3
  }
}
```

:::

![](../mosaic-results/structural-mesh/cost/cost.png){.lightbox}
